title: Hyperliquid Mobile with Dexari, Ex-Binance US
summary_title: Dexari: Building the Best Mobile App for Hyperliquid Trading
summary_description: Ex-Binance founders launch native iOS/Android app for Hyperliquid with seamless onboarding, account abstraction, and multi-chain support.

key_moments.label: Intro: Space recorded, activation codes coming, brief casual opening
Chuck introduces Dexari co-founders and ex-Binance US background
Discussion of Binance vs Hyperliquid situation, threat to centralized exchanges
Mobile-first vision explained: native iOS/Android app, better UX than PWA
Live product demo: spot trading launched, perps blocked for US, full feature parity
Multi-chain onboarding: USDC from Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base with abstracted bridging
Differentiation strategy: centralized exchange UX, native wallet, no dapp browser friction
Android app launch announcement, iOS TestFlight, RektDexari code shared
Future roadmap: vaults, staking, fiat on/off ramps, debit cards, AI analytics
Points program: retroactive points tracking pre-season, tracker coming later
Call to action: download app, join Telegram, provide feedback for rapid iteration
